name: vclaw-devforge
description: DevForge Chain marketplace — Full lifecycle software development skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: DevForge-chain
plugins.description: DevForge Chain v1.4: 12 core skills + 6 domain extensions covering full SDLC. New in v1.4: threat modeling (STRIDE), data pipeline (ETL DAG + OLAP), microservices (Service Mesh + Saga), frontend UI design system, observability engineering (SLO/SLI), and performance testing. Built on VCMF framework with DIVE cycle.
